  "findings": [
    "Isolated metal parts are not properly bonded to the grounding electrode system, creating a shock and electrocution hazard."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work in the immediate area where unbonded energized equipment could pose a hazard.",
    "Install temporary or permanent bonding jumpers to connect all isolated metal parts to the equipment grounding system."
  ],
  "rationale": "Isolated metal parts on an industrial site that are not bonded can become energized in a fault condition, creating a severe shock hazard. NEC 250.104 and 250.30 require all non-current-carrying metal parts likely to become energized to be effectively bonded to the grounding electrode system.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.104",
    "NEC 250.30"
  ]
}
